response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title 'カラフル' (Colorful) from on-screen text. Performed by Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion. Search query used: '\"カラフル\" ClariS lyrics'. Found Japanese lyrics and English translation. The song is a well-known song, often covered. Used those lyrics to fulfill the requirement.
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song 'Colorful' by Hololive talents Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion, followed by a dialogue segment between the two performers.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion perform the song 'Colorful' on a virtual stage. Title 'カラフル' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いつもモノクロだった瞳の奥の
景色が君と出会った瞬間(とき)から
色づき始めたんだ
まだイチから始めよう
絶え間ない奇跡を壊れないように
手を伸ばし 繋げば ほら
君は側で いつまでも...
まだ透明な 私たちは
どんな色にでも 染まることが
出来るから 夢叶えよう
走って行く先に 君はいた
触れた 心は輝いた
鮮やかな色になって
羽ばたくよ 希望乗せて
無限に広がる 空の下集まった
願い 守り 行けば
君と誓った あの日の記憶
今 超えて 過去から
まだ誰も知らない 明日へと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The depths of my eyes that were always monochrome
The colors began to change from the moment I met you
I want to start again from scratch
And weave a miracle that will never break
I reach out my hand and if we connect, look
You're by my side, forever...
Even the invisible us
Can be dyed any color
Because we can be dyed, let's make our dreams come true
Running ahead, you were there
Touched, my heart shone brightly
Becoming a vivid color
Let's fly, carrying our hopes
Under the sky that spreads infinitely, we gathered
Protecting our wishes, if we go
The memory of that day I swore with you
Now beyond, from the past
To a tomorrow that no one knows yet

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Murasaki Shion engage in a conversation on stage after their performance.
